{{CargoOrgan
|name=Radiated Spine
|type=Common
|rank=orange
|id=10870
|idx=77
|description=A grotesquely altered spinal column mutated by intense radiation. Its surface is coated in glowing radioactive material, softly pulsing with an eerie light.
|skill=
|hp=1874
|def=285
|atk=206
|rush=167
|gene1=Per 10 Gene Seg. devoured, {race} ATK +70
Specimen devoured: 400/400
|gene2=Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +6%
|gene3=Against Daily Hitmen, Round 1 DMG +15%
|gene4=Mutant Minion Cloning SPD +3%
|gene5=Per 2 Gastric Pouch LVLs challenged, {race} ATK +7
Gastric Pouch LVLs: 100/100
|gene7=Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +6% (Awakened)
|}}
